positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a mythical constellation of abstract beasts and celestial bodies. The composition should be centered and framed within a circular crest motif, featuring interlocking lines and geometric shapes. The primary elements include a majestic griffin, a coiled serpent, and stylized lunar phases, rendered in deep midnight blue, brilliant gold leaf accents, and ethereal teal accents. Use a linocut/woodblock engraving style mixed with modern Art Deco geometry, emphasizing high contrast and clean, strong silhouettes. Perfect for textile printing on apparel. Flat vector look with subtle engraved texture.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, watermarks, text, signature, messy, dirty, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain, noise, poor composition, photorealistic, 3D render, writing, logos
